name: lgpd
description: Brazil LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados, Law 13,709/2018) compliance advisor — legal basis analysis (Arts. 7 & 11), data subject rights fulfilment (Art. 18), DPO/Encarregado appointment, ANPD breach notification (3-day preliminary / 20-day full report), DPIA/RIPD drafting, international transfer mechanisms, gap assessments, privacy notice drafting, consent management, penalty exposure analysis (fines up to 2% revenue / R$50M), and LGPD vs. GDPR comparison. Use for any Brazilian data protection or privacy compliance question.
